## Summary

Brief description of the change and the motivation behind it. Link any related issue with `Closes #NNN`.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that changes existing behavior)
- [ ] Documentation / examples only
- [ ] Refactor / performance improvement

## How to Test

Steps to reproduce the bug or verify the new feature:

```bash
go test ./... -run TestMyNewFeature -v
```

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read CONTRIBUTING.md
- [ ] My code follows the project style (`gofmt`, no `interface{}` in public APIs)
- [ ] I have added or updated tests that cover the change
- [ ] All existing tests pass locally (`go test ./...`)
- [ ] I have updated documentation / comments where necessary
- [ ] If this is a breaking change, I have added a `BREAKING CHANGE:` note in the commit body

## Screenshots / Benchmark Results (if applicable)

Paste any relevant output, benchmark numbers, or screenshots here.
